title: Craftable Gilded Blackstone│可合成鑲金黑石
description: Added Gilded Blackstone recipe.│添加了黑石配方。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
Gilded black stone can be crafted by placing a black stone in the middle and surrounding it with gold nuggets.│透過將黑石放在中間，旁邊圍上金粒即可合成出鑲金黑石。

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
